steps.title: Factor to expose the target expression
steps.content: Notice that $3x - 27$ can be factored as $3(x - 9)$. Since we need to find $x - 9$, not $x$, this factorization gives us a shortcut. The equation becomes: $$3(x - 9) = 24$$

steps.title: Isolate x minus 9
steps.content: Divide both sides by 3: $$x - 9 = \frac{24}{3} = 8$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
